All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Admin
Represents an administrator in the application.
AdminDB
Handles all Firestore database operations for Admin actions.
CreateEventActivity
 
DashboardActivity
Dashboard activity for entrants to browse events and scan QR codes
DeleteProfileActivity
 
Entrant
Represents an entrant in the application.
Entrant.RegistrationRecord
Represents a single entry in an entrant's registration history.
Entrant.RegistrationRecord.Outcome
Possible outcomes for a registration entry.
EntrantAdapter
 
EntrantDB
Handles all Firestore database operations for Entrant objects.
EntrantListActivity
 
Event
 
EventAdapter
 
EventAdapter.EventViewHolder
 
EventDB
 
EventDetailsActivity
 
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
LotteryDB
Handles all Firestore database operations for LotteryPool objects.
LotteryDrawActivity
 
LotteryPool
Represents the lottery pool for an event in the application.
MainActivity
 
MyEventsActivity
 
MyEventsAdapter
 
MyEventsAdapter.MyEventItem
Pairs an Event with its corresponding lottery outcome for display in the My Events list.
MyEventsAdapter.MyEventViewHolder
 
MyEventsAdapter.OnItemClickListener
 
Notification
Represents a notification in the application.
Notification.NotificationType
Enum representing the type of notification being sent.
NotificationDB
Handles all Firestore database operations for Notification objects.
Organizer
Represents an organizer in the application.
OrganizerDashboardActivity
 
OrganizerDB
Handles all Firestore database operations for Organizer objects.
OrganizerEventAdapter
 
OrganizerEventAdapter.ViewHolder
 
OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
 
Poster
Represents an event poster in the application.
Profile
Represents a user profile in the application.
ProfileActivity
 
QRCodeScanner
Utility class for scanning QR codes using device camera.
QRCodeScanner.ScanCallback
Callback interface for handling QR scan results.
QRDisplayActivity
Activity to display and download event QR codes.
QRScanActivity
Launches the Google Play Services QR scanner and handles the result.
RegisterActivity
 
RegistrationTimingActivity
 
ScanQRActivity
Activity with live CameraX preview and real-time QR code detection.
